nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Rufous-capped motmot
nodes.summary: Rufous-capped motmot（Rufous-capped motmot，学名 Baryphthengus ruficapillus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于原始森林、Gallery forest，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 原始森林
nodes.summary: 原始森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联240种鸟类，包括黑額鳴冠雉、Singing quail、Stripe-faced wood quail等240种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Gallery forest
nodes.summary: Gallery forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、黑額鳴冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits primary and gallery forest, the latter mostly along watercourses

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits primary and gallery forest, the latter mostly along watercourses

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The IUCN has assessed the rufous-capped motmot as being of Least Concern. Though it has a large range, appears to have a large population, and occurs in many protected areas, deforestation elsewhere is causing its population to decline
